arts.ttl: Former Chelsea chief executive Marina Granovskaia wins High Court battle with agent over multi-million-pound dispute relating to Kurt Zouma's 2021 transfer to West Ham
arts.sum: Former Chelsea CEO Marina Granovskaia has welcomed the High Court's decision to rule in her favour in a legal battle with football agent Saif Alrubie.

arts.ttl: “Everything is in place” – Manager confirms impending Chelsea arrival; Blues have secured one of his “best talents”
arts.sum: Diambars youth academy manager Alioune Touré has confirmed that youngster Yaya Diémé is set to join Chelsea in the near future. Africa Foot have comments from the Diambars manager today in which he confirms everything is in place for the youngster to head to Chelsea. arts.ttl: Arsenal face fresh rival competition in Nico Williams pursuit
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have joined Arsenal in the race to sign Athletic Club winger Nico Williams.

arts.ttl: Mike Arteta says Myles Lewis-Skelly's England call-up will give 'a lot of hope' to other youngsters and claims it's unfair to compare him with Ethan Nwaneri
arts.sum: Mike Arteta said Myles Lewis-Skelly's rapid rise to a debut England call-up will give 'a lot of hope' to other youngsters across the country.

arts.ttl: Hugely encouraging Bukayo Saka injury update given by Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Arsenal winger Bukayo Saka has been sidelined since but December but is finally closing in on a return to first-team action according to Gunners boss Mikel Arteta

arts.ttl: Arsenal hatch transfer plan as Leroy Sane stance emerges amid Bayern Munich talks
arts.sum: "Arsenal's new sporting director Andrea Berta will discuss targets internally soon." Arsenal's new sporting director, Andrea Berta, will reportedly assess any possible transfers soon.

arts.ttl: Chelsea’s path to Conference League final after victory against Copenhagen
arts.sum: Chelsea are into the Conference League quarter-finals after beating Copenhagen over two legs. Following a 2-1 away victory in the first leg, Chelsea beat Copenhagen...

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Enzo Fernandez transfer stance revealed amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly made their position on a potential transfer for Enzo Fernandez very clear.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Ethan Nwaneri aiming to break Premier League goalscoring record in Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Arsenal winger Ethan Nwaneri could break another Premier League record when Mikel Arteta's men host London rivals Chelsea on Sunday at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: The single biggest reason why Geovany Quenda chose Chelsea despite Man United effort
arts.sum: United have been linked with a move for Quenda ever since it emerged that Amorim was leaving Sporting for Old Trafford in November, as the teenager continued to impress. Ben Jacobs has reported that the Blues have offered to play him as a winger rather than a wing-back - something that Quenda has placed as his preference despite Amorim's desire to reunite with the Portuguese talent.
